data.title: Hungary's Central Bank Governor Varga: Inflation Risks Rise Due to Fertilizer Price Increase
data.description: Hungary's Central Bank Governor Varga has highlighted concerns over rising inflation risks, attributing the increase to higher fertilizer prices. According to Jin10, Varga emphasized that the surge in fertilizer costs is contributing to upward pressure on inflation, which could have broader economic implications. The central bank is closely monitoring the situation to assess potential impacts on monetary policy and economic stability.

data.title: NUVA Digital Secures $5.2 Million in Seed Funding Led by Morgan Creek Digital
data.description:
NUVA Digital, a software development company for the RWA trading platform NUVA, has successfully raised $5.2 million in a seed funding round led by Morgan Creek Digital. According to Foresight News, NUVA is a collaborative creation by Animoca Brands and Nuva Labs. The platform enables users to deposit stablecoins with a single click, mint yield-bearing composable tokens, and provides on-chain proof of reserves without any minimum deposit or lock-up requirements.

The newly acquired funds will be utilized to accelerate platform development and expand the ecosystem. This includes enhancing the treasury market, introducing more issuers, deploying across multiple chains, building institutional-grade tools, and advancing the issuance of NUVA's functional tokens.

data.title: Bitcoin Falls Below 76,000 USDT with 2.28% Decline
data.description: Bitcoin has experienced a drop below 76,000 USDT, according to Odaily. The current price stands at 75,992.6 USDT, marking a 2.28% decrease over the past 24 hours.

data.title: Tether is developing a new Bitcoin mining infrastructure that uses a modular computing system to control costs and efficiency.
data.description: According to official sources, Tether is expanding its custom computing infrastructure with a new type of modular, high-density mining system aimed at improving the efficiency and performance of large-scale operations. Tether is collaborating with Canaan Inc. and ACME Swisstech to build the system around application-specific hash board modules and integrate them into its proprietary control architecture, thermal management system, and software stack. This system allows for independent optimization of each component by separating computing from power and enclosure, and reduces energy consumption when combined with immersion cooling technology. Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino stated that this move aims to change the current state of sealed, fixed mining equipment by deploying modular computing units that can be independently tuned, upgraded, and cooled, directly controlling the cost and efficiency of large-scale operations. Canaan Inc. Chairman and CEO Zhang Nangeng stated that its Avalon hash board modules enable more flexible, on-demand deployment, especially improving efficiency and reducing operational complexity in immersion cooling systems. This deployment builds upon Tether's previously developed open-source mining operating system (MOS) and mining software development kit (SDK).

data.title: CFTC Develops AI Tools for U.S. Crypto Market Oversight
data.description:
The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is advancing its use of artificial intelligence to enhance the review of registration applications and monitor trading in the U.S. crypto market. According to Odaily, CFTC Chairman Mike Selig highlighted the agency's efforts in an interview with CoinDesk, noting that AI and automation are being leveraged to address staffing reductions exceeding 20% due to federal government layoffs. Employees are currently being trained on Microsoft Copilot, and the CFTC is developing internal tools for swap data review and market surveillance.

Selig also emphasized the significance of the joint digital asset classification guidelines released with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), which aim to provide regulatory clarity for market participants. In the realm of prediction markets, Selig reaffirmed the CFTC's exclusive jurisdiction and stressed the agency's commitment to enforcing actions against violations such as insider trading.

data.title: Polymarket Completes Upgrade of Decentralized Prediction Market Platform
data.description: Polymarket, a decentralized prediction market platform, has successfully completed the upgrade of its spot order book CLOB v2, with trading functions gradually resuming. According to ChainCatcher, the platform experienced a brief downtime during the upgrade, which led to a temporary suspension of trading and clearing of the order book. However, user funds and positions remained secure throughout the process. Following the launch of the new version, Polymarket initiated a liquidity reward program totaling $1 million, distributing $500,000 in the first two hours and the remaining $500,000 throughout the rest of the day.

data.title: Economists Raise Inflation Forecasts for 44 Major Economies in 2026
data.description: A Reuters survey reveals that economists have increased their inflation expectations for 44 out of 50 major economies for the year 2026. According to Jin10, this adjustment reflects growing concerns about inflationary pressures globally. The survey highlights the widespread anticipation of higher inflation rates, which could impact economic policies and financial markets in the coming years.

data.title: Coreweave Highlights Diverse Client Base Beyond OpenAI
data.description: Coreweave has emphasized that OpenAI is not its sole partner, despite being an excellent collaborator. According to Jin10, the company stated that its business is supported by a diverse range of clients, showcasing a broad customer base.

data.title: CFTC Chairman: AI will be used to review registration applications for the US crypto market and to enhance market monitoring.
data.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, CFTC Chairman Mike Selig stated that the CFTC is building tools to leverage AI to review registration applications and monitor transactions in the U.S. crypto market. Selig pointed out that due to federal government layoffs resulting in a reduction of more than one-fifth of the agency's staff, AI and automation technologies will be used to fill the manpower gap and improve document review efficiency. Currently, its employees are undergoing training with Microsoft Copilot, and the agency is also developing internal tools for reviewing swap data and market monitoring. Furthermore, Selig stated that the digital asset classification guidelines jointly issued by the CFTC and the SEC are the most important initiatives of his tenure, aiming to provide regulatory clarity for market participants. Regarding prediction markets, Selig reiterated the CFTC's exclusive jurisdiction and emphasized the need for stringent enforcement action against violations such as insider trading.

data.title: Monad co-founder: There was no violation; the Monad account issue was due to a system error.
data.description: Keone Hon, co-founder of Monad, posted on the X platform that his Monad account was frozen without any warning, which he suspects was due to a system error. Monad did not perform any unusual operations or misuse of the API. He has contacted the X platform support team through various channels and expects the account to be restored soon.

data.title: Amber Premium Reports Record Revenue and Strategic Expansion
data.description: Amber Premium, a provider of institutional-grade crypto financial services, announced its full-year 2025 financial results. According to Odaily, the company achieved a record annual revenue of $66.1 million, with client trading volumes exceeding $11 billion. The average platform assets per active client reached $1.3 million. In compliance developments, Amber Premium received principle approval in Q4 2025 and was officially granted the Dubai VARA VASP license in April 2026. The company has now completed its strategic expansion across Singapore, Dubai, and Hong Kong.

data.title: Alphabet's Earnings Call to Focus on Revenue and Google Cloud Growth
data.description: Alphabet's upcoming earnings call on Wednesday will be closely monitored as analysts have set expectations for the company to achieve $106.88 billion in revenue and $2.68 in earnings per share (EPS). According to NS3.AI, Wall Street is particularly interested in whether Google Cloud can surpass its previous year-over-year growth rate of 48% and reach 50%.

data.title: Polymarket: Upgraded trading platform launched with $1 million in liquidity rewards.
data.description: Polymarket announced on its X platform that the upgraded CLOB v2 exchange is now live. A $1 million liquidity reward program is currently underway, with $500,000 distributed in the first two hours and the remaining $500,000 distributed for the rest of the day. Users who log in will see prompts to convert their balance to pUSD and approve new contracts.

data.title: The UAE announced its withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+, potentially making Trump the "biggest winner."
data.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced on Tuesday its withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+ effective May 1, a significant blow to the organization and its de facto leader, Saudi Arabia, amid the historic energy shock and global economic turmoil caused by the Iran war. The UAE's unexpected withdrawal, from a long-standing OPEC member, could plunge the organization into disarray and weaken its influence—OPEC typically strives for a unified stance despite internal disagreements on a range of issues from geopolitics to production quotas. This could be a major victory for US President Trump, who has accused the organization of "blackmailing the rest of the world" by driving up oil prices. Trump has also linked US military support in the Gulf region to oil prices, claiming that while the US is protecting OPEC members, they are "taking advantage of that by setting high oil prices." The UAE is a regional business hub and one of Washington's most important allies. This move comes after the UAE criticized other Arab states for failing to take sufficient measures to protect it from repeated Iranian attacks during the war. (Jinshi)

data.title: Polymarket Launches Upgraded CLOB v2 Trading Platform
data.description: Polymarket has announced the launch of its upgraded CLOB v2 trading platform. According to Foresight News, the platform's API is now accepting orders, and the public website will soon be accessible. A liquidity incentive of $1 million has been initiated, with $500,000 allocated in the first two hours and the remaining $500,000 distributed throughout the rest of the day.

data.title: Galaxy Digital Reports Significant Losses in Q1 2026
data.description: Galaxy Digital has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, revealing a net loss of $216 million due to declining digital asset market prices. According to Foresight News, the company reported a diluted and adjusted loss per share of $0.49, with an adjusted gross loss of $88 million and an adjusted EBITDA loss of $188 million. As of March 31, Galaxy Digital's total equity amounted to $2.8 billion, with cash and stablecoin holdings totaling $2.6 billion.

data.title: First LNG Tanker Transits Strait of Hormuz Since US-Iran Conflict Began
data.description: A liquefied natural gas tanker has transited the Strait of Hormuz for the first time since the start of the conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran, according to Iranian sources reported by CCTV News on April 28.The development marks a potentially significant shift in the energy standoff that has gripped one of the world's most critical shipping lanes since the conflict began. The Strait of Hormuz handles a substantial share of global LNG and crude oil flows, and its effective closure to commercial shipping has been a primary driver of the sharp rise in energy prices -- with WTI crude surging through $103 and Brent topping $105 on the same day.

data.title: The United Arab Emirates announced its withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+.
data.description: The statement indicates that the UAE has announced its withdrawal from OPEC and OPEC+, effective May 1st. (Jinshi)

data.title: Amber Premium's revenue hits a record high of $66.1 million in 2025.
data.description: Institutional-grade crypto financial services provider Amber Premium (NASDAQ: AMBR) today released its full-year 2025 results. The report shows that the company's total annual revenue reached a record high of $66.1 million; total client trading volume exceeded $11 billion, and the average platform assets per active client reached $1.3 million. Regarding compliance, following in-principle approval in Q4 2025, the company was officially granted a Dubai VARA VASP license in April 2026, completing its strategic layout across Singapore, Dubai, and Hong Kong in the "pan-Asian" region.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Increases Bitcoin Holdings to Over 675 BTC
data.description: Hyperscale Data, a company listed under the New York Stock Exchange, has announced an increase in its Bitcoin holdings to 675.3529 BTC. According to Foresight News, the total market value of these holdings is approximately $53.1 million. The company's wholly-owned subsidiary, Sentinum, holds 608.4272 BTC, while another subsidiary, ACG, acquired 66.9257 BTC from the open market. Hyperscale Data aims to increase the value of Bitcoin on its balance sheet to $100 million.
